metadata.description: Color blending with multiple modes - nearly complete Unity equivalents

summary: Blends two colors using various blend modes (Mix, Darken, Lighten, etc.). Most modes map directly; Screen/Overlay/Soft Light have minor shader differences.
implementation_notes: Most modes use standard math; Overlay and Soft Light require custom functions for exact match
compatibility_loss_5_percent: Overlay and Soft Light shader precision differences
